# defectdojo_tool_type (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Tool Type

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_tool_type" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the Tool Type
- `name` (String) The name of the Tool Type
